thought.text: 我将运行基线评分并查看测试样例范围。

task_list.title: Inspect task1 lexer framework and scoring setup
task_list.notes: ANTLR selected; current main leaves Loc and flags unset; grammar has minimal tokens.

task_list.title: Run current task1 score for baseline

task_list.notes: Likely implement a self-contained scanner in antlr/main.cpp for tokens, locations, line markers, whitespace flags.

task_list.notes: Iterate until full score or best achievable within budget.
